findings.title: Validator parity loop does not assert reference_only/referenceOnly
findings.summary: Claude noted the validator asserts cannot_approve_or_mutate/cannotApproveOrMutate for human_approval_refs but not the sibling reference_only/referenceOnly flag. The boundary is still enforced by cannotApproveOrMutate and validation remains non-blocking.

findings.title: BlockedClaim refs do not embed literal synthetic token
findings.summary: Claude noted blocked_claim_refs use blocked_claim.* without a synthetic token, consistent with S06 correction_route and internal blocked-claim route naming.

findings.title: Optional array presence differs from nullable matter_id behavior
findings.summary: Claude noted blocked_claim_refs and human_approval_refs must be present as arrays while matter_id may be undefined. This is defensible fail-closed relationship-map behavior.

scope_reviewed: nullable matter_id Matter relationship with sameTenantRequiredWhenPresent parity
tenant and Matter context mismatch rejection
raw_result_excerpt: overall_verdict: PASS; No P0/P1/P2 findings; Blocks subphase closeout: NO.
